summary: Comprehensive testing of new Kids Coloring Book module and SSE/polling job updates. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed - Coloring Book page loads correctly with all expected elements including mode selection (DIY/Photo), export settings, and privacy notice. Dashboard displays Kids Coloring Book card with NEW badge.
critical_code_review_comments: Coloring Book pricing API correctly returns: BASE_EXPORT=5, ACTIVITY_PAGES=2, PERSONALIZED_COVER=1, PER_EXTRA_PAGE=0.5
Cost calculation endpoint correctly handles all add-on combinations (verified: base 5, +activity 7, +personalized 6, all+extras 9)
SSE endpoints properly require authentication (401 without token)
Wallet/jobs endpoint returns correct job structure for SSE polling fallback
Dashboard shows Kids Coloring Book card with gradient styling (rose-fuchsia-violet) and NEW badge
Coloring Book page has privacy-first design notice: 'Images are processed locally in your browser'
Mode selection works: DIY Mode (empty frames with prompts) and Photo Mode (upload & convert images)
Export settings include: Page Count (8/10/12), Paper Size (A4/Letter), Activity Pages toggle, Personalized Cover toggle, Dedication field
Text-to-Image page correctly integrates SSE utility via sseManager.subscribeToJob() for job status polling
Activity templates endpoint returns 6 templates: match_characters, find_hidden, vocabulary, maze, word_search, certificate
SVG assets endpoint returns 8 shapes (star, cloud, tree, sun, heart, moon, house, flower) and 3 border types

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, all UI elements present

context_for_next_testing_agent: Coloring Book module fully functional. SSE uses smart polling fallback since native EventSource doesn't support auth headers. Demo user has no stories yet - to test full export flow, first generate a story at /app/stories. All pricing calculations verified correct.

elements_verified: Creation Mode section with DIY/Photo toggle
Story selection section (empty state with Generate Story CTA)
Export Settings: Page Count, Paper Size, Activity Pages, Personalized Cover, Dedication

DASHBOARD_COLORING_BOOK_CARD.details: Kids Coloring Book card with Palette icon, gradient styling, NEW badge, description: 'Create personalized printable story coloring books • Photo-to-outline conversion'

TEXT_TO_IMAGE_SSE.details: SSE utility imported and used for job polling, all UI elements present

COLORING_BOOK_STORIES_API.details: Returns user stories list (requires auth), empty for demo user

COLORING_BOOK_CALCULATE_COST_API.details: Correctly calculates costs with all add-on combinations

WALLET_JOBS_POLLING.details: Returns job list with correct structure for SSE polling fallback

mocked_apis.note: All features fully implemented - coloring book uses client-side jsPDF and Canvas API for PDF generation

api_endpoints_verified: /api/wallet/jobs - 200 OK (used by SSE utility for polling)
